new_classes.definition_en: Whisky produced by blending two or more single malt whiskies distilled at different distilleries, classified under heading 2208.

new_classes.label_en: Blended malt Scotch whisky in containers ≤ 2 L (subheading 2208 30 41)
new_classes.label_de: Blended Malt Scotch Whisky in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 L (Unterposition 2208 30 41)
new_classes.definition_en: Blended malt Scotch whisky produced by blending two or more single malt Scotch whiskies distilled at different distilleries, presented in containers holding 2 litres or less.

new_classes.label_en: Blended malt whisky blending process (blending of two or more single malt whiskies from different distilleries)
new_classes.label_de: Mischungsprozess für Blended Malt Whisky (Verschneiden von mindestens zwei Single Malt Whiskies aus verschiedenen Brennereien)
new_classes.definition_en: Production process in which two or more single malt whiskies, each distilled at a different distillery, are blended to produce a blended malt whisky.

new_classes.label_en: Scotch whisky origin quality (produced and matured in Scotland)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a whisky that has been distilled and matured in Scotland in accordance with the legal requirements for Scotch whisky.

new_classes.label_en: Blended malt composition quality (blend of two or more single malt whiskies from different distilleries)
new_classes.label_de: Blended-Malt-Zusammensetzungsqualität (Verschnitt aus mindestens zwei Single Malt Whiskies aus verschiedenen Brennereien)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a whisky that consists exclusively of a blend of two or more single malt whiskies, each originating from a different distillery.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria from the legal text are captured: (1) the product is a blended malt whisky produced by blending two or more single malt Scotch whiskies from different distilleries — modelled via BlendedMaltCompositionQuality and BlendedMaltWhiskyBlendingProcess; (2) the Scotch origin is captured by ScotchWhiskyOriginQuality; (3) the container size ≤ 2 L is captured via SmallContainer. A minor gap (~15%) remains: the legal text references both 22083041 and 22083049 together, and the specific threshold distinguishing "≤ 2 L" vs "> 2 L" between those two sibling codes is implicit through the SmallContainer restriction rather than a direct numeric container-volume axiom. Additionally, the formal legal definition of Scotch whisky (maturation period, geographic production requirements per UK/EU regulations) is not fully elaborated in the ontology but falls outside the CN note text itself.
